lines: Did you wash your hands after exploring, {player}?
Brushing is like giving your teeth a little spa day!
You look so fresh and clean today, {player}!
no_quest_line: You're as clean and bright as a new leaf, {player}!
quest_offer_line: Oh dear, some bubbles have escaped! Will you help me catch them, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Sparkle, sparkle! You're a master of cleanliness, {player}!
quest_complete_line: All clean! Thank you for helping me keep everything sparkly, {player}.
